items.name_en: !!️【With full original green box packaging】!!️GG Marmont series quilted mini bag. Gucci's classic small accessories continue to infuse new vitality into the brand's constantly evolving aesthetic philosophy. As a highlight of the 2023 Spring/Summer collection, the leatherware is presented in a delicate light pink, a refined and elegant tone announcing the new season. On this GG Marmont series mini bag, it is presented with a dazzling touch, complementing matching accessories in the same tone. Light pink V-shaped Matelassé leather, brass hardware with burgundy finish, cloud print fabric lining double G, sixteen card slots and two bill slots, three separate internal compartments, zip coin purse, detachable chain shoulder strap (60cm high) snap closure.
items.name_cn:

Size: 20(W)x 13(H)x 6cm(D)
Color: New Light Pink/Factory Leather.

items.name_en: !!️With full original green box packaging!!️ This chain wallet is a new addition to the Gucci Horsebit 1955 accessories collection, crafted from the brand's classic interlocking GG canvas and featuring the double-ring and rectangular design inherited from the series' handbags. The classic flip-top button closure features multiple card slots and pockets, and the detachable chain strap creates versatile styling. Blue leather details create a chic and fashionable look.

items.name_en: .🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
items.name_cn:
.🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 series handbags, interpreting the double-ring and rectangular design that inherits the brand's equestrian roots, under the vision of Creative Director Sabato De Sarno for the Qixi Valentine's Day campaign. This small shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas, featuring a unique heat-pressed pattern for a delicate look and a soft, refined touch.
Exclusive for Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined touch
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Side details: Half horsebit
Interior: 3 open pockets, 1 zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Model: 815178.
Dimensions: 25.9cm (L) x 17.5cm (W) x 9.9cm (D)
Color: Burgundy full grain/Original leather.
Made in Italy

.🌷《With full set of original green box packaging》🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 series handbags, interpreting the double-ring and rectangular design that inherits the brand's equestrian roots, under the vision of Creative Director Sabato De Sarno for the Qixi Valentine's Day campaign. This small shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas, featuring a unique heat-pressed pattern for a delicate look and a soft, refined touch.
Exclusive for Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined touch
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Side details: Half horsebit
Interior: 3 open pockets, 1 zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Model: 815178.
Dimensions: 25.9cm (L) x 17.5cm (W) x 9.9cm (D)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Made in Italy
